reasoning: The control 'Data Backup' focuses on ensuring data is backed up and recoverable. In Kubernetes, the etcd database is critical as it stores all cluster state and configuration data. Therefore, ensuring that etcd backups are configured and have a defined schedule and retention policy is essential for business continuity in a Kubernetes environment. These checks ensure that the etcd data is backed up regularly and retained according to policy, aligning with the intent of the control.
title: Data Backup
